mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND SUPPORT_AREA = #{searchSupportArea}
AND (APPLY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR EVENT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
SELECT * FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE VOL_SEQ = #{volSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
